# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Files Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_Files_Upload_Plugin {
    private $option_key = 'ufu_user_files';

    public function __construct() {
        add_shortcode('user_files_upload', array($this, 'render_shortcode'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_action('show_user_profile', array($this, 'render_user_files_section'));
        add_action('edit_user_profile', array($this, 'render_user_files_section'));
        add_action('personal_options_update', array($this, 'handle_profile_upload'));
        add_action('edit_user_profile_update', array($this, 'handle_profile_upload'));
    }

    public function get_upload_dir() {
        $upload = wp_upload_dir();
        $dir = trailingslashit($upload['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
        $url = trailingslashit($upload['baseurl']) . 'user-files/';

        if (!file_exists($dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($dir);
        }

        if (!file_exists($dir . 'index.php')) {
            @file_put_contents($dir . 'index.php', '<?php' . PHP_EOL);
        }

        return array(
            'dir' => $dir,
            'url' => $url,
        );
    }

    public function allowed_mimes() {
        return array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'gif' => 'image/gif',
            'png' => 'image/png',
            'bmp' => 'image/bmp',
            'webp' => 'image/webp',
            'pdf' => 'application/pdf',
            'doc' => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'txt' => 'text/plain',
            'rtf' => 'application/rtf',
            'odt' => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
        );
    }

    public function render_shortcode() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $messages = '';
        if (isset($_GET['ufu_message'])) {
            $msg = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_message']));
            if ($msg === 'success') {
                $messages = '<div class="ufu-message ufu-success">Files uploaded successfully.</div>';
            } elseif ($msg === 'error') {
                $messages = '<div class="ufu-message ufu-error">There was an error uploading your files.</div>';
            }
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = $this->get_user_files($user_id);

        ob_start();
        echo $messages;
        ?>
        <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <?php wp_nonce_field('ufu_upload_action', 'ufu_upload_nonce'); ?>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_profile_picture">Profile Picture</label><br>
                <input type="file" name="ufu_profile_picture" id="ufu_profile_picture" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.bmp,.webp,image/*">
            </p>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_documents">Documents</label><br>
                <input type="file" name="ufu_documents[]" id="ufu_documents" multiple accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.bmp,.webp,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.txt,.rtf,.odt">
            </p>
            <p>
                <input type="hidden" name="ufu_action" value="upload_files">
                <button type="submit">Upload Files</button>
            </p>
        </form>
        <?php if (!empty($files['profile_picture']) || !empty($files['documents'])) : ?>
            <h3>Your Uploaded Files</h3>
            <?php if (!empty($files['profile_picture'])) : ?>
                <p><strong>Profile Picture:</strong><br>
                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url($files['profile_picture']['url']); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                        <?php echo esc_html($files['profile_picture']['name']); ?>
                    </a>
                </p>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <?php if (!empty($files['documents'])) : ?>
                <p><strong>Documents:</strong></p>
                <ul>
                    <?php foreach ($files['documents'] as $document) : ?>
                        <li>
                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url($document['url']); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                <?php echo esc_html($document['name']); ?>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </ul>
            <?php endif; ?>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_action']) || $_POST['ufu_action'] !== 'upload_files') {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_upload_nonce'])), 'ufu_upload_action')) {
            return;
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $existing = $this->get_user_files($user_id);
        $success = false;

        if (!empty($_FILES['ufu_profile_picture']['name'])) {
            $uploaded = $this->process_single_file($_FILES['ufu_profile_picture'], $user_id, true);
            if ($uploaded) {
                $existing['profile_picture'] = $uploaded;
                $success = true;
            }
        }

        if (!empty($_FILES['ufu_documents']['name']) && is_array($_FILES['ufu_documents']['name'])) {
            foreach ($_FILES['ufu_documents']['name'] as $index => $name) {
                if (empty($name)) {
                    continue;
                }

                $file = array(
                    'name' => $_FILES['ufu_documents']['name'][$index],
                    'type' => $_FILES['ufu_documents']['type'][$index],
                    'tmp_name' => $_FILES['ufu_documents']['tmp_name'][$index],
                    'error' => $_FILES['ufu_documents']['error'][$index],
                    'size' => $_FILES['ufu_documents']['size'][$index],
                );

                $uploaded = $this->process_single_file($file, $user_id, false);
                if ($uploaded) {
                    $existing['documents'][] = $uploaded;
                    $success = true;
                }
            }
        }

        update_user_meta($user_id, $this->option_key, $existing);

        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }

        $redirect = add_query_arg('ufu_message', $success ? 'success' : 'error', $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }

    public function process_single_file($file, $user_id, $profile_picture = false) {
        if (!isset($file['error']) || $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            return false;
        }

        $mimes = $this->allowed_mimes();
        $check = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file['name'], $mimes);

        if (empty($check['ext']) || empty($check['type'])) {
            return false;
        }

        if ($profile_picture && strpos($check['type'], 'image/') !== 0) {
            return false;
        }

        $dirs = $this->get_upload_dir();
        $original_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $filename = wp_unique_filename($dirs['dir'], $user_id . '-' . time() . '-' . $original_name);
        $destination = $dirs['dir'] . $filename;

        if (!@move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            return false;
        }

        @chmod($destination, 0644);

        return array(
            'name' => $original_name,
            'file' => $destination,
            'url' => $dirs['url'] . $filename,
            'type' => $check['type'],
            'uploaded_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        );
    }

    public function get_user_files($user_id) {
        $files = get_user_meta($user_id, $this->option_key, true);

        if (!is_array($files)) {
            $files = array();
        }

        if (!isset($files['profile_picture'])) {
            $files['profile_picture'] = array();
        }

        if (!isset($files['documents']) || !is_array($files['documents'])) {
            $files['documents'] = array();
        }

        return $files;
    }

    public function render_user_files_section($user) {
        if (!current_user_can('edit_user', $user->ID)) {
            return;
        }

        $files = $this->get_user_files($user->ID);
        ?>
        <h2>User Files Upload</h2>
        <table class="form-table">
            <tr>
                <th><label for="ufu_profile_picture_admin">Upload Profile Picture</label></th>
                <td>
                    <input type="file" name="ufu_profile_picture_admin" id="ufu_profile_picture_admin" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.bmp,.webp,image/*">
                    <?php if (!empty($files['profile_picture'])) : ?>
                        <p>
                            Current:
                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url($files['profile_picture']['url']); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                <?php echo esc_html($files['profile_picture']['name']); ?>
                            </a>
                        </p>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <th><label for="ufu_documents_admin">Upload Documents</label></th>
                <td>
                    <input type="file" name="ufu_documents_admin[]" id="ufu_documents_admin" multiple accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.bmp,.webp,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.txt,.rtf,.odt">
                    <?php if (!empty($files['documents'])) : ?>
                        <ul>
                            <?php foreach ($files['documents'] as $document) : ?>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url($document['url']); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                        <?php echo esc_html($document['name']); ?>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                            <?php endforeach; ?>
                        </ul>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                    <?php wp_nonce_field('ufu_profile_upload_action', 'ufu_profile_upload_nonce'); ?>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </table>
        <?php
    }

    public function handle_profile_upload($user_id) {
        if (!current_user_can('edit_user', $user_id)) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_profile_upload_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_profile_upload_nonce'])), 'ufu_profile_upload_action')) {
            return;
        }

        $existing = $this->get_user_files($user_id);

        if (!empty($_FILES['ufu_profile_picture_admin']['name'])) {
            $uploaded = $this->process_single_file($_FILES['ufu_profile_picture_admin'], $user_id, true);
            if ($uploaded) {
                $existing['profile_picture'] = $uploaded;
            }
        }

        if (!empty($_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['name']) && is_array($_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['name'])) {
            foreach ($_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['name'] as $index => $name) {
                if (empty($name)) {
                    continue;
                }

                $file = array(
                    'name' => $_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['name'][$index],
                    'type' => $_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['type'][$index],
                    'tmp_name' => $_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['tmp_name'][$index],
                    'error' => $_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['error'][$index],
                    'size' => $_FILES['ufu_documents_admin']['size'][$index],
                );

                $uploaded = $this->process_single_file($file, $user_id, false);
                if ($uploaded) {
                    $existing['documents'][] = $uploaded;
                }
            }
        }

        update_user_meta($user_id, $this->option_key, $existing);
    }
}

new User_Files_Upload_Plugin();
